headline: Smart Hedge Trades For A Fragile Ceasefire
summary: The gap between market complacency and the geopolitical reality on the ground is where the asymmetric returns can be made. Click here to read my analysis.

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Old Dominion Freight, J.B. Hunt and Knight-Swift Transportation
summary: Old Dominion holds steady as trucking firms navigate weak freight demand, using cost controls and shareholder returns to stay resilient.
